title: Fix a typo in batch_np_matrix_to_pycolmap
body:
This PR addresses an UnboundLocalError in batch_np_matrix_to_pycolmap when max_reproj_error is None. The reproj_mask variable was only created inside the branch that handles reprojection-based masking, which can lead to references to an undefined variable if reprojection masking is disabled.

Change summary:
- Initialize reproj_mask at the start of batch_np_matrix_to_pycolmap (e.g., reproj_mask = None).
- Compute reproj_mask only when max_reproj_error is not None.
- Adjust the final inlier/mask combination logic to gracefully handle cases when masks or reproj_mask are None.

This preserves existing behavior when max_reproj_error is provided while fixing the crash when it is None. It also improves robustness for pipelines that pass only masks or disable reprojection masking.

Notes:
- No behavior change for the normal path where max_reproj_error is set.
- Consider adding a lightweight unit test that calls batch_np_matrix_to_pycolmap with max_reproj_error=None and with masks=None/non-None to guard against regressions in the future.

step_plan.summary: Fix a crash in batch_np_matrix_to_pycolmap by initializing reproj_mask at the start and handling None cases for masks and reprojection-based masking, preserving existing behavior when reprojection masking is enabled.

steps.operation: Refactor batch_np_matrix_to_pycolmap to initialize reproj_mask and guard its computation
steps.reason: Prevent UnboundLocalError when max_reproj_error is None by ensuring reproj_mask exists and is computed only when needed; make mask combination robust to None values.
steps.side_effects: No API change; adds a small initialization; downstream code paths that rely on masks fewer than expected may not crash; requires tests to cover None paths (e.g., max_reproj_error=None with masks=None or masks provided).
